name: tibet-home-agent
summary: TIBET Home Agent — BYOK Mode 3 relay. Run on your laptop, paired to your `.aint`, your phone's app talks to it via I-Poll. Uses your local Claude Pro / Max / Gemini / ChatGPT session — no API key on the phone. v0.3 adds M110 — TIBET key-pinning on KILL/SHUTDOWN: the daemon refuses any kill-request not signed by the pinned Root_IDD Ed25519 key (Red Specter SWARM-005 remediation, RS-2026-001).
